texto: On the outside, I 'm a husband and a father to three sons. I end to keep quiet and stay to myself. That way I stay out of trouble as much as possible. Some people say I'm almost too quiet but it's like that saying goes, it's the quiet ones you have to watch out for...
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ron Chapman: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a familia. O trecho “On the outside, I 'm a husband and a father to three sons. I end to keep quiet and stay to myself…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, horror, humor pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e humor.

frase_original: On the outside, I 'm a husband and a father to three sons. I end to keep quiet and stay to myself. That way I stay out of trouble as much as possible. Some people say I'm almost too quiet but it's like that saying goes, it's the quiet ones you have to watch out for...
